svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="能力上移" id="ability-shift"> <mxGraphModel dx="-464" dy="-147" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="880" pageHeight="480" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="GRP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="值钱的能力,从执行层往上挪了一层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="420" width="820" x="30" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DEC" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=4;" value="决策层 · AI 吃不掉" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="640" x="120" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="架构能力
分层 / 边界 / 取舍" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="150" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="判断力
做不做 / 做多深" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="355" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="经验嗅觉
一眼看出迟早出事" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="560" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EXEC" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#64748b;spacingTop=4;" value="执行层 · 被 AI 削平(语法 / API / 框架用法,过去的护城河)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="640" x="120" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ARROW" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="AI 接管,价值归零区" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="180" x="350" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="AE" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="440" y="255" /> <mxPoint x="440" y="290" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="440" y="240" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="440" y="310" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 250, 252), rgb(21, 23, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
